## Description

Brief description of changes.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactoring

## Checklist

- [ ] `cargo fmt` passes
- [ ] `cargo clippy -- -D warnings` passes
- [ ] Tests added/updated
- [ ] Documentation updated
- [ ] No unsafe code without `// SAFETY:` comments
